trans-unit.source: These exercises touch on all the content of module 5.
trans-unit.target: These exercises touch on all the content of module 5.

trans-unit.source: __[Exercise 1: Health site distribution in the Saint Louis region](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_spatial_tools_ex1.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Exercise 1: Health site distribution in the Saint Louis region](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_spatial_tools_ex1.md)__

trans-unit.source: The aim of this exercise is to become familiar with different types of spatial analysis and geoprocessing tools and understand the process of discovering relationships and connections between features in spatial data. The goal is to determine which health sites in the Saint Louis region in Senegal are prone to flooding. We will make use of Buffers, Classification, Selecting by location, and selecting using an expression.
trans-unit.target: The aim of this exercise is to become familiar with different types of spatial analysis and geoprocessing tools and understand the process of discovering relationships and connections between features in spatial data. The goal is to determine which health sites in the Saint Louis region in Senegal are prone to flooding. We will make use of Buffers, Classification, Selecting by location, and selecting using an expression.

trans-unit.source: __[Exercise 2: Disaster impact in different regions of Senegal](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_non_spatial_tools_ex2.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Exercise 2: Disaster impact in different regions of Senegal](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_non_spatial_tools_ex2.md)__

trans-unit.source: Become familiar with different types of non-spatial analysis and geoprocessing tools. Understand the process of discovering relationships and connections between features in spatial data.
trans-unit.target: Become familiar with different types of non-spatial analysis and geoprocessing tools. Understand the process of discovering relationships and connections between features in spatial data.

trans-unit.source: This exercise is based on the monitoring and triggering process used by the Somalia Red Crescent Society (SRCS) in the framework of a drought Early Action Protocol (EAP). In this exercise, you will build a simplified version of the monitoring and trigger mechanism for the FEWSNET projection pillar.
trans-unit.target: This exercise is based on the monitoring and triggering process used by the Somalia Red Crescent Society (SRCS) in the framework of a drought Early Action Protocol (EAP). In this exercise, you will build a simplified version of the monitoring and trigger mechanism for the FEWSNET projection pillar.

trans-unit.source: Data analysis, Early Action Protocol, Monitoring & Triggering
trans-unit.target: Data analysis, Early Action Protocol, Monitoring & Triggering

trans-unit.source: __[Exercise 5: Aggregate and Assess G2P Money Transfers in Pakistan](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_module_5_ex5.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Exercise 5: Aggregate and Assess G2P Money Transfers in Pakistan](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_module_5_ex5.md)__

trans-unit.source: The exercise teaches how to aggregate data on administrative levels and subsequently join the aggregated data with a polygon dataset.
trans-unit.target: The exercise teaches how to aggregate data on administrative levels and subsequently join the aggregated data with a polygon dataset.

trans-unit.source: We want to create an overview of different vulnerability indicators. Using a Covid-19 risk indicators dataset, we take % permanent wall type, % permanent roof type and poverty incidence. Using Uganda population statistics, we calculate the % of under fives and % of elderly. By combining the data, we are now able to visualise the areas in Uganda that are most vulnerable.
trans-unit.target: We want to create an overview of different vulnerability indicators. Using a Covid-19 risk indicators dataset, we take % permanent wall type, % permanent roof type and poverty incidence. Using Uganda population statistics, we calculate the % of under fives and % of elderly. By combining the data, we are now able to visualise the areas in Uganda that are most vulnerable.

trans-unit.source: In this exercise, we want to create a drought risk assessment for Somalia for early action protocols. In the context of the Forecast based Financing methodology the conduction of a robust risk assessment is a crucial step towards the development of an Early Action Protocol. A risk analysis serves to understand what kinds of disaster impacts can be expected from a particular type of hazard and to identify who and what is exposed and vulnerable to this hazard and why.
trans-unit.target: In this exercise, we want to create a drought risk assessment for Somalia for early action protocols. In the context of the Forecast based Financing methodology the conduction of a robust risk assessment is a crucial step towards the development of an Early Action Protocol. A risk analysis serves to understand what kinds of disaster impacts can be expected from a particular type of hazard and to identify who and what is exposed and vulnerable to this hazard and why.

trans-unit.source: Risk Assessment for Early Action Protocols
trans-unit.target: Risk Assessment for Early Action Protocols

trans-unit.source: This exercise teaches how to buffer cyclone track and use zonal statistics to estimate the population in the cyclone buffer
trans-unit.target: This exercise teaches how to buffer cyclone track and use zonal statistics to estimate the population in the cyclone buffer

trans-unit.source: The aim of this exercise is to aggregate data on district-level, calculate zonal statistics and use the field calculator to calculate the incidence rate of measles in a fictious scenario.
trans-unit.target: The aim of this exercise is to aggregate data on district-level, calculate zonal statistics and use the field calculator to calculate the incidence rate of measles in a fictious scenario.
